title: Modulation of antihypertensive drug effectiveness by dietary consumption: a scoping review
author: Miah, Bristi
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: This is a scoping review protocol. Research question: Which dietary consumptions modulate antihypertensive drug effectiveness? The question includes food, drink and supplemental compounds and dietary habits that may influence the effectiveness of antihypertensives. The review will register findings both on the effects of simultaneous intake of specific food and beverages with antihypertensives as well as the effects of dietary habits.
